articles.title: New Radar Tech Might Stop Close Calls On Airport Runways
articles.description: The FAA announced that a new type of radar will be used in airports to prevent accidents. This technology will replace the outdated air traffic control system.
articles.content: In January 2026, the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) announced the implementation of a new tech called Surface Movement Radars (SMR) that air traffic controllers will use to help prevent runway incidents. The George Bush Intercontinental Airpor... [2334 chars]

articles.title: US refuses application for new mRNA flu vaccine
articles.description: An application for a new flu vaccine made with Nobel Prize-winning mRNA technology has been knocked back by the US authority overseen by Robert F Kennedy Jr.
articles.content:
The US Food and Drug Administration is refusing to consider Moderna’s application for a new flu vaccine made with Nobel Prize-winning mRNA technology.
The news is the latest sign of the FDA’s heightened scrutiny of vaccines under Health Secretary Rob... [2426 chars]

articles.title: China's Strategic Maneuver: Li Qiang Signals Rare Earth Competition with U.S.
articles.description: Premier Li Qiang's visit to rare earth facilities in Jiangxi underscores China's strategic focus on rare earth minerals amid growing tension with the U.S. Highlighting their role in advanced manufacturing and green technology, Li suggests deeper integration of industry and academia. This competition could reshape global corporate dynamics.
articles.content:
In a strategic move, Premier Li Qiang visited China's rare earth facilities in Jiangxi, signaling intensified competition with the U.S. over these vital minerals, as reported by Xinhua.
Li's visit, ahead of Lunar New Year, highlighted rare earths' cr... [405 chars]

articles.title: Global AI Leader Mark Adams to Keynote Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Brisbane
articles.description: **media[933034]**As AI moves from experimentation to cultural, economic, and organisational force, CIOs are being challenged to understand not just the technology, but its real-world impact on power, creativity, and decision-making. At Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in Brisbane, March 17 - 18, 2026, global AI leader and advisor Mark Adams will deliver a keynote designed to help IT leaders cut through hype and translate AI disruption into strategic advantage.

articles.title: UK Fintech Funding Fell 21% Last Year, Hitting Lowest Since 2020
articles.description: Investment in the UK financial technology world plummeted by more than 20% last year to the lowest levels since the start of the Covid-19 pandemic, as backers hesitated on macroeconomic risks and flocked to US opportunities.
articles.content:
Investment in the UK financial technology world plummeted by more than 20% last year to the lowest levels since the start of the Covid-19 pandemic, as backers hesitated on macroeconomic risks and flocked to US opportunities.

articles.title: Defence Buying 2.0: Sturdier L1 formula & more to boost ‘Made in India’
articles.description: India is changing its defence buying rules. The government will now favor Indian firms that invest in research and own technology. This shift from 'Made in India' to 'Owned by India' aims to boost local startups. Procurement timelines will also be cut by up to 50 percent. These new rules are expected to be finalized by March.
articles.content:
Synopsis
